member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.BinaryOperations
member.summary: Contains common operations for converting binary values.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.BinaryOperations.AsBitString(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Convert this bool array into a binary string.
member.param: An bool array that represents a binary value.
member.returns: A string containing the binary info stored in the array.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.BinaryOperations.AsBitString(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Boolean},System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Convert this bool array into a binary string.
member.param: An bool array that represents a binary value.
The string will be padded to match the length of this value if not already.
Align MSB to the left most character.
member.returns: A string containing the binary info stored in the array.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.BinaryOperations.AsBitArray(System.Int32)
member.summary: Convert an integer into a binary value represented as a boolean array.
member.param: Value of to convert into bool array representing the binary value.
member.returns: A bool array containing the value of the integer. Index 0 is the LSB.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.BinaryOperations.AsBitArray(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Convert an integer into a binary value represented as a boolean array.
member.param: Value of to convert into bool array representing the binary value.
The array will be padded to match the length of this value if not already.
member.returns: A bool array containing the value of the integer. Index 0 is the LSB.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.BinaryOperations.AsBitArray(System.String)
member.summary: Convert a string value into a binary value represented as a boolean array.
member.param: String value to convert. Value is assumed to have the MSB as left aligned (index 0 is the MSB of the string).
member.returns: A binary value represented as a boolean array. Index 0 of array is the LSB.
member.exception: If the string contains characters other than '1' or '0', this exception is thrown.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.BinaryOperations.AsBitArray(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Convert a string value into a binary value represented as a boolean array.
member.param: String value to convert. Value is assumed to have the MSB as left aligned (index 0 is the MSB of the string).
The array will be padded to match the length of this value if not already.
member.returns: A binary value represented as a boolean array. Index 0 of array is the LSB.
member.exception: If the string contains characters other than '1' or '0', this exception is thrown.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.BinaryOperations.AreEqual(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Boolean},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Boolean})
member.summary: Given two boolean arrays representing binary values, check that the two arrays represent the same value.
member.param: Left array.
Right array.
member.returns: True if the two binary values are equal. False otherwise.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCapturePacketsTestMethod
member.summary: CapturePackets executes a functional test, then stores a string containing failing data into SharedStorage depending on the mode.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCapturePacketsTestMethod.#ctor(Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService,Prime.FunctionalService.IFunctionalService,Prime.PinService.IPinService,Prime.PlistService.IPlistService,Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService,Prime.TestMethods.Capture.IStopwatch)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Console service.
Functional service.
Pin service.
Plist service.
SharedStorageService.
Stopwatch.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCapturePacketsTestMethod.TotalCaptureCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the total amount of failures allowed if using PerCycleFails to generate packets. Ignored otherwise.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCapturePacketsTestMethod.KeyForSharedStorage
member.summary: Gets or sets the key to use when inserting the final binary string into shared storage.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCapturePacketsTestMethod.Sequence
member.summary: Gets or sets a sequence of integer values that will be used to sequence packets in "Wave" These values will be checked against the id value of each packet.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCapturePacketsTestMethod.DataPins
member.summary: Gets or sets pins to used to collect data for packet generation.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCapturePacketsTestMethod.IdPins
member.summary: Gets or sets pins to used to id incoming cycles.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCapturePacketsTestMethod.ValidPins
member.summary: Gets or sets pins to used to determine if incoming cycle is valid.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCapturePacketsTestMethod.ValidValues
member.summary: Gets or sets the values each valid pin should display for an incoming cycle to be considered valid.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCapturePacketsTestMethod.InvalidPacketTolerance
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum allowed incomplete packets allowed when executing the algorithm.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCapturePacketsTestMethod.Timeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum allowed time in milliseconds to innerExecute this instance before exiting out port 0.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCapturePacketsTestMethod.PacketSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the expected size of complete packets for this test instance.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCapturePacketsTestMethod.FunctionalDataToUse
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of functional test data that will be used to generate packets.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCapturePacketsTestMethod.ReversePacketOutput
member.summary: Gets or sets a boolean value that determines whether to reverse the bits of the output packets before placing them into SharedStorage.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCapturePacketsTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IPrePlistCommonParam#PrePlist
member.summary: Gets or sets the PrePlist callback to plist execution.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCapturePacketsTestMethod.GetDataFromCycle(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32})
member.summary: Gets the cycle data for a given cycle given a mapping of Pin -> vector data.
member.returns: Data for cycle from the pins defined in pinNames.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCapturePacketsTestMethod.WillHaltTestExecution
member.summary: Determine if test method execution should continue or not.
member.exception: If a is defined that has not been implemented yet.
member.returns: If the test method should stop execution.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCapturePacketsTestMethod.Bootstrapper
member.summary: Bootstrapper to inject required dependencies during runtime.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.BaseAlgorithm
member.summary: Performs operations shared between all algorithms.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.BaseAlgorithm.#ctor(Prime.FunctionalService.ICaptureFailureTest,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Func{System.ValueTuple{System.Boolean,System.Func{System.String}}}})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: CaptureFailureTest.
Conditions that cause the test instance to exit port 2 after functional test execution.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.IAlgorithmForExecution
member.summary: Defines a class that executes a functional test and returns data from functional execution.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.IAlgorithmForExecution.ExecuteFunctionalTest
member.summary: Executes the functional test, then determines if any functional fails occurred.
member.returns: True if no pattern fails occurred, false if at least one was found.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.IAlgorithmForExecution.WillHaltAfterFunctionalTest(System.Func{System.String}@)
member.summary: Determines if the functional test encountered some condition that should prevent this test instance from continuing execution.
member.param: If this function returns true, this value is populated with the debug message as to why the test method needs to halt execution.
member.returns: If true, the test instance should halt execution and report port 2.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.IAlgorithmForExecution.GetDataFromFunctionalTest(System.Func{System.Boolean},System.String@)
member.summary: Get data from functional test, then convert it into a string based off of the mode of the test method. Returns true if data was converted within the timeout limit (if timeout was set to zero, algorithm will always return true). False if timeout is exceeded.
member.param: Function that returns true when the timeout is exceeded. Causes the function to exit and return false.
Populated with data from functional test if algorithm was successful.
member.returns: True if algorithm execution time was within timeout, false otherwise.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PerPinModeWithCtv
member.summary: Algorithm for the collection of binary data for each pin using ctv, then concatenating the data for each pin in sequence.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PerPinModeWithCtv.#ctor(Prime.FunctionalService.ICaptureFailureAndCtvPerPinTest,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Func{System.ValueTuple{System.Boolean,System.Func{System.String}}}})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: to retrieve functional data from.
List of pins used for the functional test.
Conditions that cause the test instance to exit port 2 after functional test execution.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PerPinModeWithPatternFails
member.summary: Algorithm for the collection of binary data for each pin using pattern fails, then concatenating the data for each pin in sequence.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PerPinModeWithPatternFails.#ctor(Prime.FunctionalService.ICaptureFailureTest,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Func{System.ValueTuple{System.Boolean,System.Func{System.String}}}})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A pattern fail test.
List of pins used for the functional test.
Conditions that cause the test instance to exit port 2 after functional test execution.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PerSequenceModeWithCtv
member.summary: For executing a to convert ctvs into data sequenced by cycle.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PerSequenceModeWithCtv.#ctor(Prime.FunctionalService.ICaptureFailureAndCtvPerCycleTest,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Func{System.ValueTuple{System.Boolean,System.Func{System.String}}}})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: to retrieve functional data from.
List of pins used for the functional test.
Conditions that cause the test instance to exit port 2 after functional test execution.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PerSequenceModeWithPatternFails
member.summary: For executing a to convert pattern failures into data sequenced by cycle.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PerSequenceModeWithPatternFails.#ctor(Prime.FunctionalService.ICaptureFailureTest,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Func{System.ValueTuple{System.Boolean,System.Func{System.String}}}})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Uses pattern failures to capture data from functional test execution.
member.param: A pattern fail test.
List of pins used for the functional test.
Conditions that cause the test instance to exit port 2 after functional test execution.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCaptureVectorsTestMethod
member.summary: CaptureVectors executes a functional test, then stores a string containing failing data into SharedStorage depending on the mode.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCaptureVectorsTestMethod.#ctor(Prime.ConsoleService.IConsoleService,Prime.SharedStorageService.ISharedStorageService,Prime.FunctionalService.IFunctionalService,Prime.PlistService.IPlistService,Prime.TestMethods.Capture.IStopwatch)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: ConsoleService.
SharedStorageService.
FunctionalService.
PlistService.
Stopwatch.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCaptureVectorsTestMethod.DecodingMode
member.summary: Decides how to decode the incoming ctvData.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCaptureVectorsTestMethod.DecodingMode.PerPin
member.summary: Concatenate incoming fail data by iterating through each failing cycle, then appending the binary data to a string in the order of the pins.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCaptureVectorsTestMethod.DecodingMode.PerSequence
member.summary: Concatenate incoming fail data by iterating through each pin defined by the user, then appending all the failing data for the given pin to a string.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCaptureVectorsTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IPrePlistCommonParam#PrePlist
member.summary: Gets or sets the PrePlist callback to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCaptureVectorsTestMethod.Pins
member.summary: Gets or sets all pins used for capture of vectors.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCaptureVectorsTestMethod.TotalCaptureCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the total amount of failures allowed if using PerCycleFails to generate vectors. Ignored otherwise.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCaptureVectorsTestMethod.KeyForSharedStorage
member.summary: Gets or sets the key to use when inserting the final binary string into shared storage.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCaptureVectorsTestMethod.FunctionalDataToUse
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of functional test data that will be used to generate vectors.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCaptureVectorsTestMethod.Mode
member.summary: Gets or sets the decoding mode for this test method.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCaptureVectorsTestMethod.Timeout
member.summary: Gets or sets how long this test method should take to execute (in ms) before exiting out of port 0.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCaptureVectorsTestMethod.ReverseVectorOutput
member.summary: Gets or sets a boolean value that determines whether to reverse the bits of the output vectors before placing them into SharedStorage.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeCaptureVectorsTestMethod.Bootstrapper
member.summary: Bootstrapper to inject required dependencies during runtime.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeHptpCapturePacketsTestMethod
member.summary: HptpCapturePackets executes a functional test, then stores a string containing failing data into SharedStorage depending on the mode.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Console service.
Functional service.
Pattern service.
Pin service.
Plist service.
Shared storage service.
Stopwatch.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeHptpCapturePacketsTestMethod.Pins
member.summary: Gets or sets list of pins to retrieve payloads from for packet generation.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeHptpCapturePacketsTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IPrePlistCommonParam#PrePlist
member.summary: Gets or sets the PrePlist callback to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeHptpCapturePacketsTestMethod.TotalCaptureCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the total amount of failures allowed if using PerCycleFails to generate packets. Ignored otherwise.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeHptpCapturePacketsTestMethod.KeyForSharedStorage
member.summary: Gets or sets the key to use when inserting the final binary string into shared storage.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeHptpCapturePacketsTestMethod.Sequence
member.summary: Gets or sets a sequence of integers that will be used to sequence packets in "Wave" These integers will be checked against the sequence value of each packet.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeHptpCapturePacketsTestMethod.DataBits
member.summary: Gets or sets indexes of bits of packet data used marked as data for output.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeHptpCapturePacketsTestMethod.IdBits
member.summary: Gets or sets indexes of packet data used to determine the sequence of packet data.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeHptpCapturePacketsTestMethod.ValidBits
member.summary: Gets or sets indexes of packet data used to determine the validity of packet data.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeHptpCapturePacketsTestMethod.ValidValues
member.summary: Gets or sets the binary values the valid bits should display to consider the packet data as valid.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeHptpCapturePacketsTestMethod.InvalidPacketTolerance
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum allowed invalid packets allowed when executing the algorithm.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeHptpCapturePacketsTestMethod.Timeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum allowed time in milliseconds to innerExecute this instance before exiting out port 0.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeHptpCapturePacketsTestMethod.PacketSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the expected size of complete packets for this test instance.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeHptpCapturePacketsTestMethod.AlignmentLabel
member.summary: Gets or sets a string representing a label contained in functional test content.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeHptpCapturePacketsTestMethod.LabelOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets an integer indicating the offset the alignment label (or from the first vector) where pattern begins strobing for packet data.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeHptpCapturePacketsTestMethod.ReversePacketOutput
member.summary: Gets or sets a boolean value that determines whether to reverse the bits of the output packets before placing them into SharedStorage.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeHptpCapturePacketsTestMethod.MainPatternRegex
member.summary: Gets or sets a string representing a the regex to find the main pattern that is used for packet data retrieval. If the regex matches to more than one domain, the first pattern that the regex matched to will be used.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeHptpCapturePacketsTestMethod.DomainRegex
member.summary: Gets or sets a string representing a the regex to use when matching to the domain to use when collecting strobing data from the main pattern. If the regex matches to more than one domain, the first domain that the regex matched to will be used.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeHptpCapturePacketsTestMethod.ValidFailingPatternsRegex
member.summary: Gets or sets a string representing a regex to use when filtering patterns that contain packet information. If a pattern fails that doesn't match the defined regex, the test method will exit out of port 2.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeHptpCapturePacketsTestMethod.MapUserBitsToHptpIndexes(System.Int32)
member.summary: Maps the index of a flattened payload to the xy-location (xy -> x: vectorIndex, y: pinIndex) to the four scrambled cycles collected from HPTP (High Performance Test Port).

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.PrimeHptpCapturePacketsTestMethod.Bootstrapper
member.summary: Bootstrapper to inject required dependencies during runtime.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.FunctionalDataToParse
member.summary: Decides which type of data to use to create packets.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.FunctionalDataToParse.CTV
member.summary: Uses vector data obtained by using CTV instructions to create packets.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.FunctionalDataToParse.PerCycleFails
member.summary: Use vector data constructed from per cycle failures to create packets.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.Bool
member.summary: True or false.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.Bool.True
member.summary: True.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.Bool.False
member.summary: False.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.Shared
member.summary: Contains elements that are shared between Capture methodologies.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.Shared.One
member.summary: Character representing binary 1.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.Shared.Zero
member.summary: Character representing binary 0.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.Shared.EmptyString
member.summary: Points to an empty string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.Shared.CheckIfTestContainsFails(Prime.FunctionalService.ICaptureFailureTest)
member.summary: Take a functional test and check if it contains fails.
member.param: Functional test to check.
member.returns: If fails were not found and a debug string explaining that the test had no fails.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.Shared.AddIpNameToPinsIfExists(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String}@,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: If an IP scope exists for this test instance, add it to the list of pins.
member.param: Pins to add IP scope to if one exists.
Session context of test method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.Shared.CheckPinExists(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},Prime.PinService.IPinService,System.String@)
member.summary: Checks that all pins in provided list exist. If so, return true, otherwise, if any pin does not exist, return false.
member.param: Pins to check exist on TOS.
PinService.
If function returns false, populated with missing pins.
member.returns: True if all pins exist, otherwise, if any are do not exist, return false.

member.summary: Uses the wave algorithm to sequence payloads into packets.
member.param: Payloads created by reading data from functional test execution.
Length of a complete packet.
Compares against the sequence value of a payload, then determines how far it is in a packet's sequence.
Amount of incomplete packets allowed before considering this algorithm execution as a failure.

If true, modifies packet output to conform to requirements for HPTP (alight most recent packet to the left of string, align sequencing of payloads from right to left). Otherwise, use requirements for normal CapturePackets.
Console service.
Session context.
String containing all complete packets.
member.returns: If true, algorithm executed successfully. If false, the algorithm encountered a fail condition.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.Shared.IsFunctionalTestFailingOnUnexpectedPin(Prime.FunctionalService.ICaptureFailureTest,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Determines if a functional test failed on a pin not defined by the user.
member.param: A functional test that captured pattern failures.
Pins that are expected to fail.
member.returns: True if functional test failed on pins not defined by pins parameter, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.Shared.IsFunctionalTestFailingOnAmblePattern(Prime.FunctionalService.ICaptureFailureTest,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Determines if a functional test failed on an amble pattern.
member.param: A functional test that captured pattern failures.
Patterns that are amble patterns.
member.returns: True if functional test failed on pins not defined by pins parameter, false otherwise. If true, returns a debug message populated in second param.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.Shared.Payload
member.summary: Parts of payload required for wave algorithm.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.Shared.Payload.SequenceValue
member.summary: Sequence value for the payload.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.Shared.Payload.DataValue
member.summary: Data value for the payload.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.Shared.Payload.Cycles
member.summary: Cycles used to construct the payload.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.Shared.Payload.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Boolean},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Boolean},System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: Sequence value for the payload.
Data value for the payload.
Cycles used to construct this payload.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.Shared.SequenceValueComparator
member.summary: Compares against the sequence value of payloads to determine where in the sequence it lies.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.Shared.SequenceValueComparator.TotalNumberOfSequenceValues
member.summary: Gets total number of sequence values this comparator contains.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.Shared.SequenceValueComparator.Create(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts list of sequence values as integers into a comparator for the wave algorithm. Used for determining where a payload is in a packet's sequence.
member.param: User provided sequence values as integers.
Number of sequence bits defined by the user. All binary values will be padded to match this length.
member.returns: Sequence integers converted into binary values, represented as bool arrays.
member.exception: Thrown if a provided integer values exceeds the number of defined id bits.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.IStopwatch
member.summary: Keeps track of elapsed time of test instance. Used for mocking timeouts when under unit test.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.IStopwatch.Start
member.summary: Start the stopwatch.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.IStopwatch.Stop
member.summary: Stop the stopwatch.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.IStopwatch.Restart
member.summary: Restart the stopwatch.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.IStopwatch.GetElapsedTimeInMilliseconds
member.summary: Get the elapsed time since the start of the timer.
member.returns: Time elapsed since the start of the timer.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Capture.Stopwatch
member.summary: Wrapper class for C# stopwatch. Used in production to keep track of timeout conditions.
